Container.Name: wyoming-kokoro
Container.Overview: Neural text-to-speech server using Kokoro-ONNX on CPU, exposed over the Wyoming protocol. Home Assistant, Rhasspy, and any other Wyoming client can use it as a TTS engine. Over 50 voices across English, Spanish, French, Italian, Portuguese, Japanese, Korean, and Chinese. [br]Model (~80 MB) auto-downloads on first boot. Add to HA via Settings → Devices & services → Wyoming Protocol, port 10200.
Container.Description: CPU-only Kokoro TTS over the Wyoming protocol. Default voice af_heart (see upstream README for the full voice catalog — over 50 voices across English, Spanish, French, Italian, Portuguese, Japanese, Korean, Chinese).

Config.Name: Wyoming Port
Config.Description: Wyoming protocol TCP port — Home Assistant connects here (tcp://UNRAID-IP:10200).

Config.Name: Data
Config.Description: Model + voices cache. Files auto-download on first run (~80 MB).

Config.Name: KOKORO_MODEL
Config.Description: Model variant: fp32 (CPU, default, best quality), int8 (smaller, faster on edge hardware).
